UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User account and profile information, managed via role-based access control.

profilePhoto.description: URL of the user's uploaded profile photo or null.

accountStatus.description: Current status of the user account.

lastLogin.description: ISO timestamp of the user's last login.

uid.description: The UID of the user who performed the action.

userName.description: Display name of the active user.

action.description: Short description of the action taken.

details.description: Detailed notes or payload about the action.

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of when the event occurred.

stockValue.description: Total value of items in stock.

outOfStock.description: Count of products currently out of stock.

lowStockCount.description: Count of products running low in stock.

InventoryRecord.title: InventoryRecord
InventoryRecord.description: Detailed multi-stock quantities and thresholds for an enterprise product.

InventoryTransaction.title: InventoryTransaction
InventoryTransaction.description: Log of individual inventory transactions (Stock In / Stock Out).

/users/{userId}.description: Individual user profiles stored at their UID path.

/inventory_transactions/{transactionId}.description: Full audit log of stock movements.

/customers/{customerId}.description: Registered CRM customers with credit limit and loyalty tracking.

/sales_orders/{orderId}.description: Sales Orders containing overall invoice details, totals, and inline items.

/sales_items/{itemId}.description: Granular, searchable line items for every sales order.

/sales_payments/{paymentId}.description: Payments registered against Sales Orders (including split payments).

/sales_returns/{returnId}.description: Product return requests, refund amounts, and stock restoration audit trails.

/customer_ledger/{ledgerId}.description: Ledger of debits, credits, and balance tracking per customer.

/sales_history/{historyId}.description: Sales activity stream and RBAC-controlled operational audit logs.

/accounts/{accountId}.description: Chart of accounts and general ledger codes.

/bank_accounts/{bankId}.description: Corporate bank accounts and cash reserves.

/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Corporate operational expenses and category bills.

/receivables/{receivableId}.description: Accounts receivables aging and client outstanding tracker.

/payables/{payableId}.description: Accounts payables schedules and vendor liability tracker.

/employees/{employeeId}.description: Roster details, contact info, salary structure, and status.

/designations/{designationId}.description: Official job roles and associated salary grades.

/attendance/{attendanceId}.description: Daily clock-in/out records, break times, and overtime.

/leave_requests/{leaveId}.description: Annual, sick, and casual leave requests and workflow approvals.

/payroll/{payrollId}.description: Monthly payroll generation, tax withholding, and double-entry integration references.

/employee_documents/{docId}.description: Uploaded compliance contracts, passport copies, and certificates.

/performance_reviews/{reviewId}.description: Performance ratings, goals, warning records, and rewards.

/api_keys/{keyId}.description: API keys generated for secure external developer access with role scopes.

/api_logs/{logId}.description: Immutable request/response transaction logs for security auditing and rate limiting.

/automation_logs/{logId}.description: Execution histories of automated event rule triggers.

/notifications/{notificationId}.description: Unified in-app, SMS, and Email alert communication stack.

/imports/{importId}.description: Historical records of bulk data CSV/Excel importing runs.

/exports/{exportId}.description: Historical records of data CSV exporting runs.

/integration_settings/{settingId}.description: Third-party platform service keys and configs (WhatsApp, SMS, SMTP).
